plugin.name: wayfire-hud
plugin._long: Configurable left, right, or fullscreen modular HUD for Wayfire with persistent module arrangement, a read-only real TTY mirror, and a shared console.

option.name: toggle
option._long: Cycle desktop, top, interactive, invisible, and back to desktop.

option.name: enabled
option._long: Start or stop the HUD immediately without unloading Wayfire.

option.name: autostart
option._long: Launch the HUD automatically when the Wayfire plugin initializes. Disabling this does not override the live Enabled switch.

option.name: width_percent
option._long: Logical width of left/right HUD placement. Fullscreen always uses the complete selected output. Applied immediately.

option.name: opacity
option._long: Alpha opacity for terminal panel backgrounds. Applied immediately. In INTERACTIVE, use the scroll wheel while the pane selector owns focus to change this in five-percent steps.

option.name: module_directory
option._long: Optional explicit module directory. Leave blank to use the XDG user configuration at ~/.config/substr8-hud/modules.d. Changing it restarts the HUD.

option.name: initial_state
option._long: desktop, top, interactive, or invisible. Changing it restarts the HUD.
